初级.problem: 列出所有姓王的客户信息
初级.sql: SELECT client_id, client_name, client_type, register_date FROM clients WHERE client_name LIKE '王%'

中级.problem: 找出每个客户名下资产规模最大的组合
中级.sql: SELECT c.client_name, p.portfolio_code, p.current_value FROM clients c INNER JOIN portfolios p ON c.client_id = p.client_id WHERE p.current_value = (SELECT MAX(current_value) FROM portfolios WHERE client_id = c.client_id)

中级.problem: 计算每个产品被多少组合持有
中级.sql: SELECT pr.product_name, COUNT(DISTINCT h.portfolio_id) as portfolio_count FROM products pr LEFT JOIN holdings h ON pr.product_id = h.product_id GROUP BY pr.product_id, pr.product_name ORDER BY portfolio_count DESC

中级.problem: 找出所有夏普比率大于1的投资组合，并显示其当前市值和创建用户。
中级.sql: SELECT portfolio_code, current_value, create_user FROM portfolios WHERE risk_adjust_return > 1;

高级.problem: 找出每个客户风险等级下，最大回撤超过其组合限制的组合
高级.sql: SELECT c.client_name, c.risk_level, p.portfolio_code, rm.max_drawdown, p.max_drawdown_limit FROM clients c JOIN portfolios p ON c.client_id = p.client_id JOIN risk_metrics rm ON p.portfolio_id = rm.portfolio_id WHERE rm.max_drawdown > p.max_drawdown_limit;

高级.problem: 统计每个部门的客户经理所管理客户的总交易金额
高级.sql: SELECT m.department_name, SUM(t.transaction_amount) AS total_trade_amount FROM managers m JOIN clients c ON m.manager_id = c.manager_id JOIN portfolios p ON c.client_id = p.client_id JOIN transactions t ON p.portfolio_id = t.portfolio_id GROUP BY m.department_name;
